import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  mut found = false
  mut running = true
  while running
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      let trimmed = string.trim(line)
      if not found and not string.is_empty(trimmed)
        print(trimmed)
        found = true
      end
    when None
      running = false
    end
  end
  if not found
    print("(none)")
  end
  Ok(())
end
